name: eca-ecommerce-agent
description: Ecommerce Academy skills bundle — brand intelligence, email marketing campaigns, competitor analysis, Meta ad copywriting, customer persona building, SEO/AI blog writing, UGC video scripts, and SEO/AI store audits. New skills are added here over time; installing this one plugin keeps you current with all of them.  What's new (v1.9.0): Audit shows the score + scorecard table in the chat summary, always routes content creation/rewrites through the blog skill, and adds an agentic-commerce readiness check (agents.md, UCP/MCP, AI-agent feeds).
